title: CT16 static tactic graph — Whole-object exact types
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT16 (Whole-object exact types). It requires the complete 13-node array in fixed source order from CT16.N01 through CT16.N13, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT16 (Whole-object exact types) tactic specification; must equal "CT16".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT16.N01, "Definition — delocalized distinguishing structure X⊆ Z", in CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT16.N01, "Definition — delocalized distinguishing structure X⊆ Z"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT16.N01, "Definition — delocalized distinguishing structure X⊆ Z"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT16.N02, "Dichotomy lemma — is Z=G?", in CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT16.N02, "Dichotomy lemma — is Z=G?"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT16.N02, "Dichotomy lemma — is Z=G?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT16.N03, "Payload lemma — build P_16→3 — proper-piece context", in CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT16.N03, "Payload lemma — build P_16→3 — proper-piece context"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT16.N03, "Payload lemma — build P_16→3 — proper-piece context"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT16.N04, "CT 3 — external types", in CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT16.N04, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT16.N04, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT16.N05, "Definition — exact closed type for the whole object", in CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT16.N05, "Definition — exact closed type for the whole object"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT16.N05, "Definition — exact closed type for the whole object"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT16.N06, "Lemma — closed-type computation", in CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT16.N06, "Lemma — closed-type computation"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT16.N06, "Lemma — closed-type computation"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT16.N07, "Scope candidate — closed type not finite — scope audit", in CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT16.N07, "Scope candidate — closed type not finite — scope audit"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT16.N07, "Scope candidate — closed type not finite — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT16.N08, "Lemma — are the closed data literally equal?", in CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT16.N08, "Lemma — are the closed data literally equal?"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT16.N08, "Lemma — are the closed data literally equal?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT16.N09, "Payload record — P_16→10: distinct closed type", in CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT16.N09, "Payload record — P_16→10: distinct closed type"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT16.N09, "Payload record — P_16→10: distinct closed type"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT16.N10, "Lemma — P_16→10 satisfies CT10 trigger", in CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16.N10".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT16.N10, "Lemma — P_16→10 satisfies CT10 trigger"; must equal the integer 10.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT16.N10, "Lemma — P_16→10 satisfies CT10 trigger"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT16.N11, "CT 10 — refinement", in CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16.N11".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT16.N11, "CT 10 — refinement"; must equal the integer 11.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT16.N11, "CT 10 — refinement"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT16.N12, "Lemma — exact-type identification", in CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16.N12".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT16.N12, "Lemma — exact-type identification"; must equal the integer 12.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT16.N12, "Lemma — exact-type identification"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT16.N13, "C2 — whole-object identification", in CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16.N13".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT16.N13, "C2 — whole-object identification"; must equal the integer 13.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT16.N13, "C2 — whole-object identification"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodes.description: Required complete node specification for CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must contain exactly 13 generic node objects in source order from CT16.N01 through CT16.N13, with the fixed identity, ordinal, and role declared at each position.
